brand.description: Brand name shown next to the logo mark.

newsletterHeading.description: Heading above the newsletter form. Hidden when empty.

columns.description: Link columns; each item is an object with a `title` string and a `links` array of `{label, href}` objects.

copyright.description: Copyright line in the bottom bar.

legalLinks.description: Legal links in the bottom bar; each item is an object with `label` and `href` strings.

children.description: Child slices keyed by child slug; `newsletter-form-01` takes one Newsletter Form prop object.
